title: UltraBoost
description: The most optimized modpack for low-end PCs
body:
## UltraBoost — The Peak of Minecraft Performance

**UltraBoost is a lightweight, Fabric-based pack built for pure speed. No filler, no clutter — just the highest possible FPS.**

Real performance results:
UltraBoost reached up to 260 FPS, while other popular optimization packs struggled to hit 190-230 FPS. The difference is massive.

![UltraBoost Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/096f7119fdd21b3109b52443c5ee9d62957906d4.png)

![Available Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366d8fb23174aa95afec3f7fed20a7131eb1bc68.png)

### What you get:

1. Faster loads, smoother rendering, stable ticks
1. Zero stutter and reduced latency
1. Memory-efficient and network-friendly
1. Perfect for low-end PCs and servers
1. Clean vanilla feel — no unnecessary mods

This pack beats every other optimization pack tested. Right now, it’s the most optimized Minecraft modpack in the world — built for players who want the absolute maximum from their game.

UltraBoost — when every frame matters.

## Real Performance Benchmark
Tested over 10 optimization packs — this one delivered the best performance

Note: All FPS results were measured in equal testing conditions.

<details>
<summary>Settings Test</summary>
  
Tested on these Minecraft settings on a laptop (Intel i5-7300U, 8GB RAM, Intel HD 620)

![Performance Test](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75212b5f04849c80daac658bdded9386cbeb8e47.png)
![FPS TEST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b52aab023a110cd9f5ae1ceaaf1e5ed3c48f169e_0.webp)
</details>
